    G

    generateReport(User, LocalDate, LocalDate) - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.service.ReportService
    Generates a compliance report for the authenticated user's organization covering the specified date range.
    generateToken(UserDetails) - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.security.JwtService
    Generates a new JWT for the given user.
    getAlcoholPercentage() - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.controller.AlcoholLogRequest
     
    getAlcoholPercentage() - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.controller.AlcoholLogResponse
     
    getAlcoholPercentage() - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.model.AlcoholLog
    Returns the alcohol percentage associated with the log entry.
    getAll(User) - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.controller.TemperatureController
    Returns all temperature logs for the authenticated user's organization.
    getAll(User, int, int) - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.controller.DeviationController
    Returns a paginated list of deviations for the authenticated user's organization.
    getAll(User, int, int, ModuleType, Frequency) - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.controller.ChecklistController
    Returns a paginated list of checklists for the authenticated user's organization, with optional filtering by module type and frequency.
    getAllChecklists(User) - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.service.ChecklistService
    Returns all checklists for the user's organization.
    getAllDeviations(User) - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.service.DeviationService
    Returns all deviations for the user's organization.
    getAllEquipment(User) - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.controller.EquipmentController
    Returns all equipment registered for the authenticated user's organization.
    getAllUsers(User) - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.controller.AdminController
    Returns all users in the authenticated admin's organization.
    getAllUsers(User) - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.service.AdminService
    Returns all users in the authenticated admin's organization.
    getAuthorities() - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.model.User
    Returns the authorities granted to the user.
    getChecklistsByOrganization(User, int, int, ModuleType, Frequency) - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.service.ChecklistService
    Returns a paginated list of checklists for the user's organization, optionally filtered by module type and frequency.
    getCurrentDayLogs(String) - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.service.AlcoholLogService
    Returns all alcohol log entries recorded for the current day in the user's organization.
    getCurrentDayLogs(Authentication) - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.controller.AlcoholLogController
    Returns alcohol log entries recorded for the current day.
    getCurrentUser() - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.service.TrainingService
    Returns the currently authenticated user from the Spring Security context.
    getDescription() - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.controller.ChecklistRequest
     
    getDescription() - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.controller.DeviationRequest
     
    getDeviations(User, int, int) - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.service.DeviationService
    Returns a paginated list of deviations for the user's organization, sorted by creation date descending.
    getDocumentById(Long) - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.service.TrainingService
    Returns a training document by its ID.
    getDocumentsByType(TrainingDocumentType) - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.service.TrainingService
    Returns all active training documents of the given type for the current user's organization.
    getEquipmentForOrganization(User) - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.service.EquipmentService
    Returns all equipment registered for the authenticated user's organization, sorted alphabetically by name.
    getFrequency() - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.controller.ChecklistRequest

    Returns the guest age associated with the log entry.
    getHistory(User, Long, String, String, String) - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.controller.TemperatureController
    Returns filtered temperature log history for the organization.
    getHistory(User, Long, String, String, String) - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.service.TemperatureService
    Returns a filtered list of temperature logs for the organization.
    getId() - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.controller.AlcoholLogResponse
     
    getId() - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.model.AlcoholLog
    Returns the unique identifier of the alcohol log entry.

    Returns whether identification was checked.
    getItems() - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.controller.ChecklistRequest
     
    getLatest(User, int) - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.controller.TemperatureController
    Returns the most recent temperature log entries for the organization.
    getLatestDeviations(User, int) - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.controller.TemperatureController
    Returns the most recent temperature deviation entries for the organization.
    getLatestDeviations(User, int) - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.service.TemperatureService
    Returns the most recent temperature deviation entries for the organization.
    getLatestLogs(User, int) - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.service.TemperatureService
    Returns the most recent temperature logs for the organization, up to the given limit.
    getLogsByDate(String, LocalDate) - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.service.AlcoholLogService
    Returns alcohol log entries for a specific date in the user's organization.
    getLogsByDate(LocalDate, Authentication) - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.controller.AlcoholLogController
    Returns alcohol log entries for a specific date.
    getLogsForOrganization(User) - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.service.TemperatureService
    Returns all temperature logs for the authenticated user's organization.
    getMaterials() - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.controller.TrainingController
    Returns all training material documents available in the system.

    getMyAcknowledgements() - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.controller.TrainingController
    Returns all document acknowledgements made by the currently authenticated user.
    getMyAcknowledgements() - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.service.TrainingService
    Returns all document acknowledgements made by the currently authenticated employee.
    getMyCertifications() - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.controller.TrainingController
    Returns certifications earned by the currently authenticated user.
    getMyCertifications() - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.service.TrainingService
    Returns all certifications earned by the currently authenticated employee.
    getMyTrainingStatuses() - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.controller.TrainingController
    Returns the training completion statuses for the currently authenticated user.
    getMyTrainingStatuses() - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.service.TrainingService
    Returns the training completion status for each active document in the organization, as seen by the currently authenticated employee.

    getNotes() - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.controller.AlcoholLogResponse
     
    getNotes() - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.model.AlcoholLog
    Returns the optional notes attached to the log entry.
    getOrganization() - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.model.AlcoholLog
    Returns the organization that the log entry belongs to.
    getOrganizationCertifications() - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.service.TrainingService
    Returns all certifications earned within the current user's organization.
    getOrganizationEmployees() - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.controller.TrainingController
    Returns a list of employees in the current organization.
    getOrganizationEmployees() - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.service.TrainingService
    Returns a list of employee users in the current user's organization.
    getPassword() - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.model.User
    Returns the user's password.
    getPolicies() - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.controller.TrainingController
    Returns all policy documents available in the system.

    Returns the quiz questions for a specific training document.
    getQuizQuestions(Long) - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.service.TrainingService
    Returns the quiz questions for a specific training document.

    Returns the exact date and time when the log was recorded.

    Returns a dashboard summary of temperature status across all equipment.
    getSummary(User) - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.service.TemperatureService
    Returns a dashboard summary of today's temperature activity for the organization.
    getTeamAcknowledgements() - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.controller.TrainingController
    Returns all document acknowledgements across the current organization.

    Returns all document acknowledgements across the current user's organization.
